code:
import io
import string

fn main() -> Unit
  let line = match io.read_line()
  when Some(s)
    s
  when None
    ""
  end

  let n = string.len(line)
  mut sum = 0
  mut i = 0
  mut token = ""
  mut stopped = false

  while i < n and not stopped
    let b = match string.byte_at(line, i)
    when Some(x)
      x
    when None
      0
    end

    if b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13
      if not string.is_empty(token)
        let v = match string.parse_int(token)
        when Some(x)
          x
        when None
          0
        end
        if v < 0
          stopped = true
        else
          sum = sum + v
        end
        token = ""
      end
    else
      token = "#{token}#{string.from_byte(b)}"
    end

    i = i + 1
  end

  if not stopped
    if not string.is_empty(token)
      let v = match string.parse_int(token)
      when Some(x)
        x
      when None
        0
      end
      if v < 0
        stopped = true
      else
        sum = sum + v
      end
    end
  end

  println("partial=#{sum}")
end
